content: Oh that one
This guide is amazing btw, so well put together!
Hii who do i put in my 4th slot as a tanker? Im thinking winkle. Does the realm of my 4th matter?

the realm does not matter

Winkle is your best option but she is not really contributing a lot of shielding. She is there as an aliemus battery/weakness applier first and a shielder second
most of the shield is going to come from tentacle white stance
should I find a different warden? I have some aqueor wardens (Murphy, Sanga, Caecus), should i go for those instead, i realize this team might also lack dmg idkk
murphy is a much better tank
arachne dps is not bad at this level so you should be fine
faros can also dish out some dmg
oh this is my second team so im going to use these for d-tide not for fl
caecus is not a tank, he is a heal over time support
arachne dps will no diff up to like alert 3
its ultra ring
arachne will solo carry
alright thanks!

mouchette e2

wheel unseen is kind of overkill
and life drain is team unique
so the 2nd one does nothing

anything
burial ground is the default for if u dont know what to put
pick either thais or aigis to be the keyflare bot, and the other one should be on burial and generic support wheels

Anyone know what substats your DPS' covenants would prefer? Like is there a prio on which substat is better?
Hi, I am stuck on 7-18 boss with sorel/celeste/thais/aigis. Any ideas what to changes or what better team I could make?
Sorel might not be optimal for that fight tbh
The boss alternate between mobs spawn and boss fight
You'll have to fight mobs for like 3 or 4 times
And fight the boss the same
If you don't mind, the idea can be something like caecus + nautila
Caecus regen counter stacks
And nautila exalt is fixed damages so it bypass the enemies barrier
And will scale based on counter stacks
You just have to shield yourself
You use nautila's exalt on the mobs and save alienus until then
The boss will naturally dies from counter
You can help yourself with celeste for revive although it's a bit rough without E3 to make the revive every 6 turns
Thanks, I will give it a try then, what others 2 characters should i put in the team?
For the other unit you can go with tawil
Tawil nautila caecus and last one is flex
It should be no brainer and easy clear chapter 7 final boss
Don't forget that you can also interact with the tentacle icon to shield yourself
Yes I have been using this quite often, thanks for the tips!
